Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Dollar General Corporation
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health & Safety Code. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ru
